query:
SELECT c.name, c.title, c.company, c.email, c.contactTrustTier, p.name AS project
FROM contacts c
JOIN projects p ON c.project = p.name
WHERE p.id IN (1350035, 1350021)
  AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
ORDER BY p.priority ASC, p.name ASC;
